_comment: Operator-specific pipeline dashboard config. Copy to .pipeline-config.json at the orchestrator repo root (gitignored), then populate notion_page_id / notion_database_url / data_source_id with the IDs returned when you create the dashboard via Notion MCP. project_rows is the per-project sync cache: leave empty on first run; the pipeline-syncer subagent writes {page_id, props, body_updated_at} entries here so subsequent ticks can skip unchanged rows. parent_fingerprint caches the parent-page inputs for the same skip-if-unchanged purpose.
